title: Donkey Kong Country
description: Level race — first to complete a set of levels wins. Track lives as tiebreaker.

p1_lives.notes: AR: B6A863:AD (infinite lives cheat = write AD here). Actual live lives value at this address.

kong_status.notes: AR: BF8FA4:03 = both Kongs. Bit flags: bit0=DK alive, bit1=Diddy alive.

level_complete.notes: AR: BF8E84:FF = Return of Kong flag. Changes on level exit.

tournament_rules: Race format — first player to complete World 1 (5 levels + boss) wins. Simultaneous start on separate machines or split-screen if supported. Lives count as tiebreaker if tied.
notes: AR codes use bank addressing (BF prefix = bank $BF). Actual WRAM addresses need live verification — subtract $7E0000 offset. Verify 0xA863 is correct WRAM lives location.
sources: libretro-database/cht SNES AR: B6A863 lives, BF8FA4 kong status
